This practical 2-piece set includes a snug-fitting non-scratch mittens and a delicate beanie, offering full protection against cold weather. No-scratch glove elastic at the wrist to stay on baby's little hands. Ideal for chilly days, walks, or photoshoots. Featuring a minimalist white color and subtle ribbed texture, this hat and mittens combo suits both baby boys and girls. Its timeless style pairs effortlessly with any outfit, from casual wear to special occasions. Package Including 1 x Baby Hat And Mittens Set
